summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Admin Business Operating System for Konekt B2B platform. All 35 backend API tests passed (100%). All frontend features verified working correctly including CRM, Tasks, Inventory, Invoices, Creative Services, and Service Detail pages.

dashboard_summary_api.returns: orders, service_orders, leads, new_leads_today, open_tasks, invoices, quotes, low_stock_items, pending_orders, total_revenue

crm_pipeline.create_lead: PASS - Create new lead with all fields
crm_pipeline.list_leads: PASS - List all leads with pagination
crm_pipeline.filter_by_status: PASS - Filter leads by status (new, contacted, qualified, proposal_sent, won, lost)
crm_pipeline.get_lead: PASS - Get specific lead by ID
crm_pipeline.update_lead_status: PASS - Update lead status with UI status change verified
crm_pipeline.delete_lead: PASS - Delete lead removes from database

task_management.create_task: PASS - Create new task with title, description, assignee, priority
task_management.list_tasks: PASS - List all tasks with pagination
task_management.filter_by_status: PASS - Filter tasks by status (todo, in_progress, done, blocked)
task_management.filter_by_priority: PASS - Filter tasks by priority (low, medium, high, urgent)
task_management.update_task_status: PASS - Update task status via API and UI
task_management.delete_task: PASS - Delete task removes from database
task_management.kanban_board_ui: PASS - Kanban board displays 4 columns (Todo, In Progress, Done, Blocked)

inventory_management.create_item: PASS - Create inventory item with SKU, title, category, quantity
inventory_management.get_item: PASS - Get specific inventory item by ID
inventory_management.low_stock_alert: PASS - Low stock items endpoint returns items below reorder level

invoice_management.create_invoice: PASS - Create invoice with line items, generates INV-YYYYMMDD-XXXXXX number
invoice_management.list_invoices: PASS - List all invoices with pagination
invoice_management.filter_by_status: PASS - Filter invoices by status (draft, sent, partially_paid, paid, overdue, cancelled)
invoice_management.get_invoice: PASS - Get specific invoice by ID
invoice_management.add_payment: PASS - Add payment to invoice, updates amount_paid
invoice_management.full_payment_auto_paid: PASS - Full payment automatically changes status to 'paid'
invoice_management.stats_cards_ui: PASS - Shows Total Invoices, Paid Revenue, Pending Amount, Overdue stats

quote_management.create_quote: PASS - Create quote with line items, generates QT-YYYYMMDD-XXXXXX number
quote_management.get_quote: PASS - Get specific quote by ID

creative_services_page.page_load: PASS - Creative Services page loads with hero section
creative_services_page.process_steps: PASS - Shows 4-step process (Choose Service, Submit Brief, Review Drafts, Get Finals)
creative_services_page.services_grid: PASS - Displays 8 design services with View Service and Start Project buttons
creative_services_page.navigation_to_detail: PASS - View Service button navigates to service detail page

service_detail_page.page_load: PASS - Service Detail page loads with service information
service_detail_page.package_selection: PASS - Shows 3 package options (with pricing in TZS)
service_detail_page.design_brief_form: PASS - Design brief form appears with Contact Information fields

seed_data_creation: Test data created during testing (prefixed with TEST_): leads, tasks, inventory items, invoices, quotes. UI tests created: 'TEST UI Company XYZ' lead, 'TEST UI Task - Follow up' task
context_for_next_testing_agent: Admin Business OS is fully functional. All CRUD operations work for CRM, Tasks, Inventory, Invoices, and Quotes. Frontend pages properly integrate with backend APIs. Creative Services flow (service listing -> detail -> brief form) works correctly. Test data with TEST_ prefix exists in database.
features_verified: Admin Dashboard Summary API - returns all required metrics
CRM Pipeline - create, list, filter, update status, delete leads
Task Management - create, list, filter, update status, delete tasks, Kanban board view
Inventory Management - create items, stock movements (in/out/adjustment), low stock alerts
Invoice Management - create with line items, update status, add payments, auto-paid on full payment
Quote Management - create, list, get, update status
Creative Services Page - displays services with View/Start Project buttons
Service Detail Page - package selection, Start Project button, Design Brief form
